summary: Project with a background image applied as the main background.
architectural_notes: Main background uses a user-provided image as the primary background.
imageRequirements:
## Edit Images
- Use the uploaded file as-is, saved to the project as (new-qro-main.jpeg)

existing_features.title: Save the uploaded image (new-qro-main.jpeg) as the static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/new-qro-main.jpeg and use it as the background image in the HeroSection component, replacing the current background image. The image should cover the full viewport with object-fit cover and be centered.
